title: Paraná, Entre Ríos — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]

Overview

Paraná is a city in Entre Ríos with a population of 339,930. Entre Ríos’ capital on the Paraná River with a historic tunnel, cathedral, and Carnival celebrations.
